results.title: Eleven people, including teenager, injured in Russian strikes on Sumy Oblast – photos
results.description: Russian forces attacked Sumy Oblast over the past day, injuring 11 people, including a 13-year-old boy.

results.title: Caregiver, 60, nabbed for allegedly abusing four-year-old
results.description: SEREMBAN: A 60-year-old woman has been arrested for allegedly abusing a four-year-old boy under her care at a house here on Thursday (May 21).

results.title: Solihull crime falling after patrol crackdown for these offences
results.description: Police said increased patrols in hotspot areas is one of the reasons crime has fallen in Solihull

results.title: Memories of Stamford Bridge carnage fade as Arsenal rule the Premier League roost
results.description: A nostalgic look back at Chelsea’s 6-0 demolition of Arsenal in 2014 serves as a stark reminder of how the tables have turned, with the Gunners now dominant.

results.title: Transparency “Essential for Investor Confidence in Africa,” Boakai Says
results.description: President Boakai emphasizes importance of transparency and accountability in regional conference for English-speaking audit institutions in Liberia, aiming to strengthen oversight and investor confidence across Africa.

results.title: Delhi-Noida International Airport in just 21 minutes: New RRTS corridor plan moves ahead, proposal to connect Jewar via bullet train
results.description: The proposed high-speed corridor is expected to cut travel time between the capital and the airport to around 21 minutes.

results.title: Today's weather LIVE updates: Delhi sees first severe heatstroke patients; searches for ‘Manali weather’ spike
results.description: Today's weather live updates: Unbearable heatwave conditions have hit parts of India, including Delhi, prompting the India Meteorological Department (IMD) to issue major orange and red alerts for several states and cities to stay prepared to handle the sizzling hot weather.
